mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (message_id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, role, content, token_count) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{agentId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{tokenCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, message_id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, role, content, token_count, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
